+def get_user(db_path, user_id):
+    conn = sqlite3.connect(db_path)
+    cur = conn.cursor()
+    query = "SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = '%s'" % user_id
+    cur.execute(query)
+    rows = cur.fetchall()
+    return rows
+
+
+def lookup(config, key):
+    try:
+        return config[key]
+    except:
+        pass
+
+
+def last_item(items):
+    return items[len(items)]
